---
title: "A single-projection three-dimensional reconstruction algorithm for scanning transmission electron microscopy data"
type: "article"
author: "H. G. Brown, P. Pelz, S. Hsu, Z. Zhang, R. Ramesh, K. Inzani, E. Sheridan, S. M. Griffin, M. Schloz, T. C. Pekin, C. T. Koch, S. D. Findlay, L. J. Allen, M. Scott, C. Ophus, J. Ciston"
year: "2020"
publication: "arXiv (Cornell University)"
preprint: ""
doi: "10.48550/arxiv.2011.07652"
materials: ""
code_url: ""
project_page_url: ""
toc: false
categories:
  - electron microscopy
  - software
  - imaging
  - computational
# --- citation metrics (auto-managed; do not edit) ---
cited_by_count: 0
is_oa: true
oa_status: green
metrics_updated: "2026-05-02T16:15:23Z"
# --- end citation metrics ---
---
## Citation (APA 7)

> A single-projection three-dimensional reconstruction algorithm for scanning transmission electron microscopy data
H. G. Brown, P. Pelz, S. Hsu, Z. Zhang, R. Ramesh, K. Inzani, E. Sheridan, S. M. Griffin, M. Schloz, T. C. Pekin, C. T. Koch, S. D. Findlay, L. J. Allen, M. Scott, C. Ophus, J. Ciston
arXiv (Cornell University)


## Abstract

[Abstract will be added manually]
